ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "state_fips" INTEGER /* Federal Information Processing Standards (FIPS) code for the state */,
  "state_postal" TEXT /* Postal abbreviation for the state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_types" (
  "policy_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy type */,
  "policy_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the policy is implemented */,
  "policy_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the policy type */,
  "mandate" INTEGER /* Indicates if a mandate is in place */,
  "statewide" INTEGER /* Indicates if the policy is statewide */,
  "curfew" INTEGER /* Indicates if a curfew is in place */,
  "date_issued" TEXT /* Date the policy was issued */,
  "date_enacted" TEXT /* Date the policy was enacted */,
  "date_expiry" TEXT /* Date the policy expires */,
  "date_eased" TEXT /* Date the policy was eased */,
  "date_ended" TEXT /* Date the policy ended */,
  "date_reexpanded1" TEXT /* Date the policy was re-expanded */,
  "date_reeased1" TEXT /* Date the policy was re-eased */,
  "policy_coding_notes" TEXT /* Notes on policy coding */,
  "last_updated_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the last update */,
  "re_reviewed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the policy has been re-reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_policy_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_type_id") REFERENCES policy_types ("policy_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "curfews" (
  "curfew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each curfew */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the policy the curfew is associated with */,
  "curfew_start" TEXT /* Starting time of the curfew */,
  "curfew_end" TEXT /* Ending time of the curfew */,
  "curfew_EXCEPTIONS" TEXT /* Exceptions to the curfew, e.g. essential workers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("curfew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_curfews_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gatherings" (
  "gathering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gathering restriction */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the policy the gathering restriction is associated with */,
  "in_gath_lim" INTEGER /* Limit on indoor gatherings */,
  "out_gath_lim" INTEGER /* Limit on outdoor gatherings */,
  "in_gath_lim_religious" INTEGER /* Limit on indoor religious gatherings */,
  "out_gath_lim_religious" INTEGER /* Limit on outdoor religious gatherings */,
  "gathering_SIZE_DESC" TEXT /* Description of gathering size restrictions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gathering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gatherings_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restrictions" (
  "restriction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restriction */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the policy the restriction is associated with */,
  "business_restrict_level" TEXT /* Level of business restrictions */,
  "school_restrict_level" TEXT /* Level of school restrictions */,
  "public_mask_level" TEXT /* Level of public mask mandate */,
  "business_size_restrict" TEXT /* Restrictions on business size */,
  "school_SIZE_restrict" TEXT /* Restrictions on school size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restriction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restrictions_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy source */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the policy the source is associated with */,
  "policy_source" TEXT /* Source of the policy information */,
  "source_TYPE" TEXT /* Type of policy source (e.g. government website, news article, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_sources_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the policy the update is associated with */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the policy was last updated */,
  "last_updated_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the last update */,
  "update_TYPE" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g. extension, amendment, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_updates_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the policy the review is associated with */,
  "re_reviewed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the policy has been re-reviewed */,
  "review_DATE" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "review_NOTES" TEXT /* Notes on the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_reviews_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the policy the metric is associated with */,
  "metric_NAME" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g. case count, hospitalization rate, etc.) */,
  "metric_VALUE" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_DATE" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_metrics_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the policy the impact is associated with */,
  "impact_TYPE" TEXT /* Type of impact (e.g. economic, social, etc.) */,
  "impact_DESC" TEXT /* Description of the impact */,
  "impact_DATE" TEXT /* Date the impact was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_impact_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)
